answer:
\[\frac{\sqrt{2}(x-a)}{2 x-a} - \left(\left(\frac{\sqrt{x}}{\sqrt{2 x}+\sqrt{a}}\right)^2+\left(\frac{\sqrt{2 x}+\sqrt{a}}{2 \sqrt{a}}\right)^{-1}\right)^{1/2}\]

Substitute \(a = 0.32\) and \(x = 0.08\):

\[\frac{\sqrt{2}(0.08-0.32)}{2(0.08) - 0.32} - \left(\left(\frac{\sqrt{0.08}}{\sqrt{2(0.08)}+\sqrt{0.32}}\right)^2+\left(\frac{\sqrt{2(0.08)}+\sqrt{0.32}}{2 \sqrt{0.32}}\right)^{-1}\right)^{1/2}\]

Calculate the square roots:

\[\frac{\sqrt{2}(0.08-0.32)}{2(0.08) - 0.32} - \left(\left(\frac{\sqrt{0.08}}{0.5+\sqrt{0.0384}}\right)^2+\left(\frac{0.5+\sqrt{0.0384}}{0.6}\right)^{-1}\right)^{1/2}\]

Simplify the expression inside the parentheses:

\[\frac{\sqrt{2}(0.08-0.32)}{2(0.08) - 0.32} - \left(\left(\frac{\sqrt{0.08}}{0.5+0.196}\right)^2+\left(\frac{0.5+0.196}{0.6}\right)^{-1}\right)^{1/2}\]

\[\frac{\sqrt{2}(0.08-0.32)}{2(0.08) - 0.32} - \left(\left(\frac{\sqrt{0.08}}{0.696}\right)^2+\left(\frac{0.696}{0.6}\right)^{-1}\right)^{1/2}\]

Calculate the exponents:

\[\frac{\sqrt{2}(0.08-0.32)}{2(0.08) - 0.32} - \left(\left(\frac{0.24492}{0.696}\right)^2+\left(\frac{1.112}{0.6}\right)\right)^{1/2}\]

Calculate the multiplication inside the parentheses:

\[\frac{\sqrt{2}(0.08-0.32)}{2(0.08) - 0.32} - \left(\left(\frac{0.24492}{0.696}\right)^2+1.8528\right)^{1/2}\]

Calculate the exponent:

\[\frac{\sqrt{2}(0.08-0.32)}{2(0.08) - 0.32} - \boxed{\sqrt{\left(\frac{0.24492}{0.696}\right)^2+1.8528}} \]
